name.description: The official name of the agency.

ownerId.description: The user ID of the person who created and owns the agency.

agentIds.description: A list of user IDs for all agents belonging to this agency.

address.description: The physical address of the agency.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the agency.

email.description: The contact email address for the agency.

primaryColor.description: Primary brand color in hex format.

facebookUrl.description: URL for the agency's Facebook page.

instagramUrl.description: URL for the agency's Instagram profile.

linkedinUrl.description: URL for the agency's LinkedIn page.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and agency settings.

agencyId.description: The ID of the agency this user belongs to.

role.description: The user's role within the agency (e.g., admin, agent).

Invite.title: Invite
Invite.description: Represents an invitation for a new agent to join an agency.

email.description: The email of the user being invited.

agencyId.description: The ID of the agency the user is invited to join.

agencyName.description: The name of the agency for display purposes in the invite.

role.description: The role assigned to the invited user.

invitedBy.description: The UID of the admin who sent the invitation.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: Represents a contact, which can be a client, lead, or partner.

name.description: The full name of the contact.

email.description: The email address of the contact.

phone.description: The phone number of the contact.

source.description: The source of the lead (e.g., Website, Referral).

budget.description: The estimated budget of the contact.

status.description: The current status of the lead (e.g., Nou, Contactat).

contactType.description: The type of contact (e.g., client, lead, partner).

leadScore.description: The lead score of the contact.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the contact was created.

city.description: The city where the contact is looking for a property.

zones.description: A list of preferred zones within the selected city.

agentId.description: The ID of the agent who created or is assigned to this contact.

priority.description: The priority level of the lead.

propertyType.description: The type of property (e.g., house, apartment).

contactId.description: Reference to Contact. (Relationship: Contact 1:N Property). Represents the agent or contact associated with the listing.

promotions.description: An object tracking the promotion status on various real estate portals.

agentId.description: The ID of the agent who created or is assigned to this property.

status.description: The current status of the property listing (e.g., active, sold).

featured.description: Whether the property should be featured on the agency's public homepage.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a task to be completed.

status.description: The status of the task (e.g., open, completed).

contactId.description: Reference to Contact. (Relationship: Contact 1:N Task). Represents contact associated with the task.

agentId.description: The ID of the agent who created or is assigned to this task.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a report on sales performance, lead conversion rates, and agent activity.

description.description: A description of the report's content.

dateGenerated.description: The date the report was generated.

metrics.description: Key metrics included in the report (e.g., sales performance, lead conversion rates).

sentDate.description: Date and time the email was sent.

contactId.description: Reference to Contact. (Relationship: Contact 1:N Email). Represents contact associated with the email.

definition.description: Stores user-specific profile data, including their agency affiliation and role. Authorization is based on the `userId`.
Top-level collection for all agencies. Each document contains agency-specific branding and details.

params.name: agencyId
params.description: The unique ID of the agency.

definition.description: Stores invitations for new agents to join an agency. The document ID is the base64 encoded email of the invitee.

params.name: inviteId
params.description: The base64 encoded email of the person being invited.

definition.description: Stores contacts for a specific agency. Authorization is based on the user's membership in the agency.

params.name: agencyId
params.description: The ID of the agency that owns the contact.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The unique ID of the contact.

definition.description: Stores property listings for a specific agency. Authorization is based on the user's membership in the agency.

params.name: agencyId
params.description: The ID of the agency that owns the property.

params.name: propertyId
params.description: The unique ID of the property.

definition.description: Stores tasks for a specific agency. Authorization is based on the user's membership in the agency.

params.name: agencyId
params.description: The ID of the agency that owns the task.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique ID of the task.

definition.description: Stores reports for a specific agency. Authorization is based on the user's membership in the agency.

params.name: agencyId
params.description: The ID of the agency that owns the report.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique ID of the report.

definition.description: Stores emails related to a specific agency. Authorization is based on the user's membership in the agency.

params.name: agencyId
params.description: The ID of the agency that owns the email.

params.name: emailId
params.description: The unique ID of the email.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is refactored for a multi-agency architecture. A top-level 'agencies' collection now serves as the root for all agency-specific data (contacts, properties, etc.), ensuring data isolation. The 'users' collection stores user profiles, each containing an 'agencyId' to link them to their respective agency. This model simplifies security rules by allowing checks against the user's 'agencyId' for all sub-collection access, preventing data leakage between agencies and enabling secure, scalable per-agency data management. A new top-level 'invites' collection is added to manage agent invitations. A 'notifications' sub-collection is added to each user document to store user-specific notifications.
